protocol.online_update: release every counterfactual expert reward only when its actual exit_pos <= current signal_pos
protocol.history: expert-local rolling completed-event utility; no current or future event outcome
protocol.execution: one global non-overlapping position; selected expert's fixed hold/TP/SL
protocol.annualization: full calendar window including idle time
protocol.mdd: strict bar-level adverse OHLC excursion plus realized equity high-water
protocol.status_ceiling: shadow research; no retrospective live promotion
protocol.expert_provenance_warning: the six sleeve definitions were committed on 2026-07-10 after this programme had inspected 2024-2026; selector OOS is mechanically frozen but not a fresh-data claim
